artifacts.title: Love receipt from 2023-07-18
artifacts.excerpt: 10. I was listening to someone play guitar and it was a special song for me. I started crying hard. The towo people next to me held me but I didn't want to hide my tears... I wanted people to see and know the overwhelming love I felt and to normalize being emotional in public.

artifacts.title: Love receipt from 2023-09-23
artifacts.excerpt:
"Friends! I thought you were facing your fears."
"We were but... not without you." 
"No," the child lowered their head, "I can't do it."
"You can! We'll find a way... we'll go slow and easy."
"Are you sure?"
"Of course! We love you 🥹 We choose you."

The End
